name: Birkin 35 leather handbag
description:
The elusive Birkin bag from Hermès was designed after then-artistic director, Jean-Louis Dumas, was sat next to Jane Birkin on a flight from Paris to London and the pair discussed the perfect weekend bag. Constructed with a trapeze silhouette, the structured top-handle accessory sits atop metal feet.
Listing Title: Hermès Vintage Rouge H Bleu Marine Courchevel Birkin 35 GHW
